title: Marathon Digital Holdings Reports First Quarter 2024 Results
text: Marathon Digital Holdings reported Q1 2024 results showing mixed performance. Revenues increased 223% to $165.2 million in Q1 2024 from $51.1 million in Q1 2023. Net income increased 184% to $337.2 million or $1.26 per diluted share compared to prior year. However, revenue of $165.20 million fell short of analyst consensus estimates of $180.69 million by 8.57%. The company beat earnings per share estimates significantly, demonstrating operational efficiency gains. Bitcoin production increased 28% during the quarter while average Bitcoin prices improved 126% year-over-year. The results reflected operational challenges during the quarter but showed strong profitability metrics.
